title: transfer — HTTP middleware
description: Two owned middleware for job-scoped authorization and artifact-signed downloads. Everything else composes from foundation + tenants + versioning + throttle stacks.

middleware.role: Resolves the {jobId} route parameter to an XferJob record. Refuses (404 with TRANSFER_JOB_NOT_FOUND) when the caller is not the initiator AND does not hold `platform.transfer.viewAny`. Runs after tenant.resolve so tenant scoping applies.

Validates Laravel's signed-URL signature on artifact download routes and resolves the artifact record. The signature IS the credential — no Sanctum session required. Refuses expired or tampered URLs with TRANSFER_ARTIFACT_LINK_INVALID. Signature TTL from config('transfer.download_url_ttl_minutes').

throttle_pools.name: transfer-ingest
throttle_pools.limit: 10 per minute per user + 30 per minute per tenant
throttle_pools.description: File uploads. Aggressive to protect worker capacity.

throttle_pools.name: transfer-egress
throttle_pools.limit: 20 per minute per user + 60 per minute per tenant

throttle_pools.name: transfer-read
throttle_pools.description: Job list + entities + templates + mapping profiles.
